DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE DIM_MOTHER_MARRIAGE_EVENTS (
	MOTHER_MARRIAGE_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	MOTHER_ID BIGINT,
	MH1BC BIGINT,
	MH1BF BIGINT,
	MH1AC BIGINT,
	MH18BC VARCHAR(20),
	MH18BF VARCHAR(20),
	MH18AC VARCHAR(20),
	FOREIGN KEY (MOTHER_ID) REFERENCES DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS (MOTHER_ID)
);

DROP TABLE IF EXISTS DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE DIM_MOTHER_GAUNA_EVENTS (
	MOTHER_GAUNA_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	MOTHER_ID BIGINT,
	MH2BC BIGINT,
	MH2BF BIGINT,
	MH2AC BIGINT,
	MH19BC VARCHAR(20),
	MH19BF VARCHAR(20),
	MH19AC VARCHAR(20),
	FOREIGN KEY (MOTHER_ID) REFERENCES DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS (MOTHER_ID)
);

description: Child's demographic and vital status information
Core birth event fact table linking all dimensions
DDL:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS FACT_BIRTH_EVENT CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE FACT_BIRTH_EVENT (
	BIRTH_EVENT_ID BIGINT PRIMARY KEY,
	CHILD_ID BIGINT,
	MOTHER_ID BIGINT,
	HOUSEHOLD_ID BIGINT,
	SURVEY_ID BIGINT,
	BH2 BIGINT,
	FOREIGN KEY (CHILD_ID) REFERENCES DIM_CHILD_DEMOGRAPHICS (CHILD_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (MOTHER_ID) REFERENCES DIM_MOTHER_DEMOGRAPHICS (MOTHER_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (HOUSEHOLD_ID) REFERENCES DIM_HOUSEHOLD (HOUSEHOLD_ID),
	FOREIGN KEY (SURVEY_ID) REFERENCES DIM_SURVEY (SURVEY_ID)
);
